create_tool_context: create a ToolContext with session_id, project_dir, and working_dir for tool execution
create_tool_result: create a ToolResult with title, output, and optional metadata and error fields
build_custom_tool: build a custom tool by subclassing Tool and implementing name, description, parameters, and execute
register_tool: register a tool instance in the global registry using register_tool
list_tools: list all registered tools in the global registry using list_tools
